name: iPhone 17 Leaks

article.title: iPhone 17 Pro Max: Everything We Know So Far
article.description: New renders, leaked specs, and insider info on Apple's next flagship smartphone.

reactions.author: TechInsider_Daily
reactions.text: The camera upgrade is going to be insane. 48MP periscope lens is a game changer.

reactions.author: AppleTracker_Pro
reactions.text: I've been following Apple leaks for 10 years. This is the most credible source we've had.

reactions.author: AndroidFan_Always
reactions.text: Cool specs, but I'll wait for the Google Pixel 10 to drop first.

reactions.author: MobileIndustry
reactions.text: The AI features are what I'm most excited about. Finally, Apple catching up.

source.title: Exclusive: iPhone 17 Pro Max Complete Spec Sheet Leaked
source.author: Juli Clover

speakerNotes: iPhone 17 leaks are heating up - this is huge news
Social buzz is massive - 4.3M views already
Camera specs are generating the most interest
People are split on whether to upgrade
